name: recon-core-portal
description: Recon Core — customer procurement portal (full-stack: Express + Prisma API, Vite + React client). Deploys to Vercel as static frontend + serverless API.

scripts.setup: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix server run setup && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.serve: npm run build && npm --prefix server run start
scripts.vercel-build: prisma generate --schema server/prisma/schema.prisma && npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix client run build
